name: How to Claim Mortgage Broker Listings on Angie’s List
description: Design a seamless online to offline discovery journey with your Angie’s List broker listings.
main_title: How to Claim Mortgage Broker Listings on Angie’s List
richtext:
When it comes to getting noticed as a service provider, Angie’s List is one site you want to consider. As a mortgage company, Angie’s List offers profiles that provide full details of your business, including the option for consumers to leave reviews. Angie’s List is considered a go-to site for top-rated professional services, so you want to get noticed here.

Did you know that once your company profile is set up, you can claim your mortgage broker listings as well? By claiming your company employees, you are streamlining the listings of your business. When a consumer searches for mortgage brokers in the area by name or company, your listings will be bundled together for more exposure!

Get started by following our step-by-step guide below. Easily claim your mortgage broker listings and build a strong reputation online for your company via Angie’s List.

Step 1

The first step to claiming a profile is to visit Angieslistbusinesscenter.com. From there, the home page explains how Angie’s List works and allows you to claim a business. Click on the List My Business green tab to get started.

Sign in or list your business on Angie's List

Step 2

Use the information boxes to add your service type and zip code. Angie’s List provides listings for individuals who work within mortgage companies, such as brokers. Add your zip code next and click Get Started to continue with the profile set up.

Set up your Angie's List profile

Step 3

Next up is the personal details of your mortgage broker. Angie’s List needs to know how homeowners can contact you. List the broker’s first and last name, business name (which would be your company name), phone number, and zip code.

Add your brokers' infomation

Next, you are taken to the Create Your Account Screen. Add your email and password here, agreeing to service terms. Decide if you would like to receive email offers and discounts at this time, then select Create Account.

Step 4

The profile is now set up and Angie’s List welcomes you to the business center. From there, the profile of your broker can be completed with photos added, features of your business highlighted, and categories of service updated.

The profile can also receive messages and reviews. Access the profile from time to time to read reviews, commenting on both negative and positive reviews. Interacting with your client base will help to show potential clients that you are serious about offering quality mortgage service options. 

Claim your Angie’s List profile today to start building a stronger online presence for your mortgage service company.



‍
join_title: Spend More Time Running Your Business
join_description: And, less time obsessing about your local presence

seo.title: How to Claim Mortgage Broker Listings on Angie’s List
